introSection: Euro Coaster is a travelling roller coaster operated by Buwalda. It is a suspended wild mouse roller coaster from Reverchon. It is one of two known Gliding Coaster designs from Reverchon, the other being Ala Delta. Chinese company Golden Horse have also built several of its very similar Suspended Coaster (XGC-4A) model.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Euro Coaster is thought to have been introduced at Tilburgse Kermis in 2001.

The roller coaster attends Hyde Park Winter Wonderland in London, UK where it is re-branded as the "Christmas Coaster". The earliest known appearance of the Christmas Coaster is 2009.

Since 29 May 2020, the attraction has been operating at Prater in Austria.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by over-the-shoulder restraints.

fullText:
Euro Coaster is a travelling roller coaster operated by Buwalda. It is a suspended wild mouse roller coaster from Reverchon. It is one of two known Gliding Coaster designs from Reverchon, the other being Ala Delta. Chinese company Golden Horse have also built several of its very similar Suspended Coaster (XGC-4A) model.

Euro Coaster is thought to have been introduced at Tilburgse Kermis in 2001.

The roller coaster attends Hyde Park Winter Wonderland in London, UK where it is re-branded as the "Christmas Coaster". The earliest known appearance of the Christmas Coaster is 2009.

Since 29 May 2020, the attraction has been operating at Prater in Austria.



Riders are held in by over-the-shoulder restraints.
